name: TBH Helper
description: Windows-only Python helper for Task Bar Hero (TBH) — tkinter GUI, OpenCV template matching, Win32 mouse/keyboard input

customCommands.name: verify-imports
customCommands.command: python -c "import gui.stash_panel; from utils.config import template_path_for; from functionality.stash_loop import stash_loop; print('All imports OK')"

rules: Windows-only project — do not introduce cross-platform abstractions
Use Win32 input via wrappers/win32api_wrapper.py — do not replace with other libraries
Process-facing name is 'Helper' — do not use 'bot' in titles, loggers, or exe names
Template paths must go through template_path_for() so window_scale works
Use random_timeout() / random_delay_ms() for delays — avoid fixed waits
Comments for non-obvious behavior only (Windows quirks, timing rationale)
Do not add .env or secret handling unless asked
Do not create git commits or PRs unless explicitly asked
